title: pavetta moluccana
intro: Pavetta moluccana, also known as the 'Yellow Bells' or 'Tangerine Bush', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Pavetta moluccana include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
